description: Celebrate the sweetest holiday with our delightful email template, perfect for bakeries, small businesses, and food and beverage enterprises. The design is tastefully sprinkled with pink and green hues, echoing the iconic frosting of your favorite doughnut. This animated template is ideal for seasonal promotions, especially for National Doughnut Day. Engage your newsletter subscribers with mouth-watering recipes and delectable treats, inspiring them to indulge in your bakery's offerings. Whether you're launching a new doughnut flavor or sharing a beloved recipe, this template will add a festive touch to your celebration. Remember, every day can be a doughnut day with the right promotion!
short_description: Celebrate National Doughnut Day with our vibrant email template. Perfect for bakeries, small businesses in the food and beverage sector. Engage subscribers with delectable recipes and treats, ideal for seasonal promotions and product launches.

designer.description:
My name is Allison Valenzuela, I'm a Midwest based graphic designer. Born and raised in Davenport, Iowa and currently living in Moline. I graduated from the University of Iowa with a BFA in Graphic Design and a Certificate of Entrepreneurial Management in May 2015.

Taking on a creative challenge, working hard to make ideas a reality and puzzle piecing things together is what I do best. I always sport a positive and can-do attitude. I love doing freelance, so if you've got a project that you'd like to get in touch with me about, send me a message!
